documentation.description:
| Purpose
| Text_Formatter manipulates objects of type STRING (text), placing
| text into the output file as it is received.  Text_Formatter is
| also used to define the format of the text (number of lines per page,
| header, footer, etc.).
|
| Initialization Exceptions (none)
| Notes (none)
|
| Modifications
| 08/16/89   Rick Conn    Initial version

simple_types.name: HEADER_FOOTER_LINE
simple_types.code:
type HEADER_FOOTER_LINE is
  new INTEGER range 1 .. Maximum_Number_Of_Header_Footer_Lines;

simple_types.name: LINE_ATTRIBUTE
simple_types.code:
type LINE_ATTRIBUTE is
  (BOLD,
   CENTER,
   FILL,
   FILL_STATE_BEFORE_CENTER,
   JUSTIFY,
   PAGING,
   UNDERLINE,
   UNDERLINE_PUNCT,
   USE_FORM_FEED
  );

enumeration_literals.name: BOLD
enumeration_literals.description: Make words come out bold (overstrike)

enumeration_literals.name: CENTER
enumeration_literals.description: Center lines (Put_Line with No Fill)

enumeration_literals.name: FILL
enumeration_literals.description:
Successively place words into an output
 line until the next word will not fit
 between the left and right margins
 (with indents)

enumeration_literals.name: FILL_STATE_BEFORE_CENTER
enumeration_literals.description: Save area for FILL

enumeration_literals.name: JUSTIFY
enumeration_literals.description:
Fill output line to RIGHT_MARGIN -
 RIGHT_INDENT with spaces between words

enumeration_literals.name: PAGING
enumeration_literals.description:
Break output on page boundaries,
 outputting footer, bottom margin,
 top margin, and header

enumeration_literals.name: UNDERLINE
enumeration_literals.description: Underline words

enumeration_literals.name: UNDERLINE_PUNCT
enumeration_literals.description: If ON, underline punctuation

enumeration_literals.name: USE_FORM_FEED
enumeration_literals.description: Use form feeds to eject pages

simple_types.name: LINE_NUMBER
simple_types.code: type LINE_NUMBER is new INTEGER range 0 .. Maximum_Number_Of_Lines_On_Page;

simple_types.name: PAGE_ATTRIBUTE
simple_types.code:
type PAGE_ATTRIBUTE is
  (TOP_MARGIN,
   BOTTOM_MARGIN,
   LEFT_MARGIN,
   RIGHT_MARGIN,
   LEFT_INDENT,
   RIGHT_INDENT,
   TOTAL_LINES,
   HEADER_LINES,
   …,
   TEMP_INDENT
  );

enumeration_literals.name: TOP_MARGIN
enumeration_literals.description: Number of lines before first header

enumeration_literals.name: BOTTOM_MARGIN
enumeration_literals.description: Number of lines after last footer

enumeration_literals.name: LEFT_MARGIN
enumeration_literals.description: Column num of the last col before the 1st char

enumeration_literals.name: RIGHT_MARGIN
enumeration_literals.description: Column number of the last char of the line

enumeration_literals.name: LEFT_INDENT
enumeration_literals.description: Number of columns to indent from LEFT_MARGIN

enumeration_literals.name: RIGHT_INDENT
enumeration_literals.description: Number of columns to indent from RIGHT_MARGIN

enumeration_literals.name: TOTAL_LINES
enumeration_literals.description: Number of lines on a page

enumeration_literals.name: HEADER_LINES
enumeration_literals.description: Number of lines in the header

enumeration_literals.name: FOOTER_LINES
enumeration_literals.description: Number of lines in the footer

enumeration_literals.name: LINE_SPACING
enumeration_literals.description: Number of blank lines after each text line

enumeration_literals.name: PAGE_OFFSET
enumeration_literals.description: Number of columns to offset each line

enumeration_literals.name: TEMP_INDENT
enumeration_literals.description: Number of columns to indent next line only

simple_types.name: PAGE_NUMBER
simple_types.code: type PAGE_NUMBER is new INTEGER range 0 .. Maximum_Number_Of_Pages;

array_types.name: LINE_ATTRIBUTE_LIST
array_types.code: type LINE_ATTRIBUTE_LIST is array (LINE_ATTRIBUTE) of OFF_ON;

array_types.name: PAGE_ATTRIBUTE_LIST
array_types.code: type PAGE_ATTRIBUTE_LIST is array (PAGE_ATTRIBUTE) of NATURAL;

constants.name: Line_Attribute_Defaults
constants.code:
Line_Attribute_Defaults : constant LINE_ATTRIBUTE_LIST :=
  (BOLD                     => OFF,
   CENTER                   => OFF,
   …
   USE_FORM_FEED            => ON);

subprograms.name: Break_Line
subprograms.code: procedure Break_Line (Item : in FILE)

subprograms.name: Break_Page
subprograms.code: procedure Break_Page (Item : in FILE)

subprograms.name: Break_Page
subprograms.code: procedure Break_Page (Item : in FILE; New_Page_Num : in PAGE_NUMBER)

subprograms.name: Close
subprograms.code: procedure Close (Item : in FILE)

subprograms.name: Current_Line
subprograms.code: function Current_Line (Item : in FILE) return LINE_NUMBER

subprograms.name: Current_Page
subprograms.code: function Current_Page (Item : in FILE) return PAGE_NUMBER

subprograms.name: Current_Page
subprograms.code: function Current_Page (Item : in FILE) return STRING

subprograms.name: Get_Line_Attribute
subprograms.code:
function Get_Line_Attribute
  (Item : in FILE; What : in LINE_ATTRIBUTE) return OFF_ON

subprograms.name: Get_Page_Attribute
subprograms.code:
function Get_Page_Attribute
  (Item : in FILE; What : in PAGE_ATTRIBUTE) return NATURAL

subprograms.name: Open
subprograms.code:
procedure Open
  (Item : in out FILE; File_Name : in STRING; Result : out STATUS)

subprograms.name: Page_Number_Format
subprograms.code: function Page_Number_Format (Item : in FILE) return NUMERIC_FORMAT

subprograms.name: Put_Invisible_Word
subprograms.code: procedure Put_Invisible_Word (Item : in FILE; What : in STRING)

subprograms.name: Put_Line
subprograms.code: procedure Put_Line (Item : in FILE; What : in STRING)

subprograms.name: Put_Word
subprograms.code: procedure Put_Word (Item : in FILE; What : in STRING)

subprograms.name: Set_Footer_Line
Set_Header_Line
Set_Line_Attribute
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Line_Attribute
  (Item : in FILE; What : in LINE_ATTRIBUTE; To : in OFF_ON)

subprograms.name: Set_Page_Attribute
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Page_Attribute
  (Item : in FILE; What : in PAGE_ATTRIBUTE; To : in NATURAL)

subprograms.name: Set_Page_Number_Format
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Page_Number_Format (Item : in FILE; To : in NUMERIC_FORMAT)

subprograms.name: Set_Page_Number_Format
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Page_Number_Format
  (Item : in FILE; To : in NUMERIC_FORMAT; Format_String : in STRING)

subprograms.name: Set_Page_Number_Id
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Page_Number_Id (Item : in FILE; To : in CHARACTER)

subprograms.name: Skip
subprograms.code: procedure Skip (Item : in FILE; Number_Of_Lines : in LINE_NUMBER := 1)

subprograms.name: Test_Page
subprograms.code:
function Test_Page
  (Item : in FILE; Number_Of_Lines : in LINE_NUMBER) return BOOLEAN
